bead.title: feat(executions): wire RetainDays config to ExecutionCleanupManager prune
bead.description:
PROBLEM
  cli/internal/config/types.go:245 defines a RetainDays field on
  ExecutionsConfig, but no code reads or acts on it. The cleanup
  manager (cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup.go) scans
  .ddx/executions/ via scanCompleteEvidenceDirs (line 453) but the
  function is observation-only — it counts dirs, emits telemetry,
  and never deletes.

  Result: every execute-bead attempt creates a subdir under
  .ddx/executions/<attempt-id>/ that is tracked by git
  (.gitignore lines 438-445 explicitly un-ignore the 5 evidence
  file types). Today's 3,427 dirs × ~3.5 files = 12,096 tracked
  files, 52% of the entire repo's tracked file count.

  No retention. No bound. Repo bloats forever. The schema field
  was clearly intended to gate this exact behavior; it just was
  never wired up.

CURRENT STATE
  - cli/internal/config/types.go:245 ExecutionsConfig.RetainDays
    declared but never read.
  - cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup.go ExecutionCleanupManager.Cleanup
    runs every ~10 minutes during drain (per
    cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup_loop.go:13) and on
    drain startup (loop line 688).
  - scanCompleteEvidenceDirs (line 453) reads the directory,
    counts dirs, emits complete_evidence observations, but
    contains no os.Remove or os.RemoveAll.
  - 3,427 execution dirs accumulated.

PROPOSED FIX
  - cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup.go: extend the existing
    cleanup pass to delete .ddx/executions/<attempt-id>/ dirs
    whose mtime is older than ExecutionsConfig.RetainDays days.
  - Skip dirs whose attempt-id is referenced by any active
    run-state file (cli/internal/agent/run_state*.go) — these
    are in-flight attempts whose evidence may still be written.
  - Skip dirs that contain a result.json with status indicating
    the attempt is still active (to be safe; defensive).
  - Default RetainDays in cli/internal/config/loader.go (or
    similar): 7 days. Operators can override via .ddx.yml.
  - Add structured ExecutionCleanupSummary.RemovedEvidenceDirs
    counter; emit it in the existing cleanup log line.
  - Ensure the bulk delete uses git rm (not just os.RemoveAll)
    so the deletions are reflected in git state. Use
    `git ls-files .ddx/executions/<attempt-id>` to find tracked
    files, then `git rm -rf` the dir.

  Tests:
    - TestExecutionCleanup_DeletesOldDirs: assert dirs older than
      RetainDays are removed.
    - TestExecutionCleanup_PreservesActiveDirs: assert dirs with
      live run-state references are NOT deleted.
    - TestExecutionCleanup_RetainDaysDefault7: assert default
      retention is 7 days when not configured.
    - TestExecutionCleanup_RetainDaysZero_DisablesRetention:
      assert RetainDays=0 disables the prune.
    - TestExecutionCleanup_RecordsCount: assert
      RemovedEvidenceDirs counter accurate.

NON-SCOPE
  - The mirror backend (sister bead).
  - Removing .gitignore un-ignores (sister bead).
  - Manual one-shot cleanup of existing 3,427 dirs (operator
    can run this before this bead lands).

INTERSECTIONS
  - Sister bead "chore(gitignore): stop tracking .ddx/executions/"
    — after this bead lands and reduces in-tree dirs, that bead
    completes the cleanup by removing the un-ignore lines.
  - Sister bead "feat(mirror): wire executions.mirror" — optional;
    not required for this bead to function.
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup.go ExecutionCleanupManager.Cleanup deletes execution dirs older than ExecutionsConfig.RetainDays days.
2. Active dirs (referenced by run-state) are skipped.
3. Default RetainDays is 7 (configurable via .ddx.yml).
4. RetainDays=0 disables the prune.
5. ExecutionCleanupSummary.RemovedEvidenceDirs counter is incremented per delete and surfaced in the cleanup log.
6. TestExecutionCleanup_DeletesOldDirs, TestExecutionCleanup_PreservesActiveDirs, TestExecutionCleanup_RetainDaysDefault7, TestExecutionCleanup_RetainDaysZero_DisablesRetention, TestExecutionCleanup_RecordsCount all pass.
7. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/config/... green.
8. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
